disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden bilateral burning, throbbing and bright redness of both feet, markedly worse with warmth and relieved by cooling
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your feet feel like and look like?
Does anything make the burning better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both feet are on fire and bright red, throbbing. A warm room makes it unbearable and cool moving air is the only thing that eases it a bit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Transient painless complete loss of vision in the right eye lasting about ten minutes, described as a dark curtain, then full recovery
trigger_question_examples: Tell me exactly what happened with your eye.
How long did the vision loss last and did it come back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About two hours ago a dark curtain came down over my right eye and I couldn't see anything on that side for about ten minutes, then it came back completely on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent dull headache for about two months with general malaise
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any headaches recently?
Have you been feeling unwell in yourself lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a nagging headache for a couple of months now and I've just felt run down and tired.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent mild nosebleeds over the past week
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any bleeding, such as nosebleeds or easy bruising?
Any bleeding gums or blood noticed anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've had a few mild nosebleeds this past week, which is unusual for me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: 1 gram of paracetamol taken with no effect on the foot pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain and did it help?
Did the paracetamol make any difference to the burning?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took a gram of paracetamol earlier but it did absolutely nothing for the burning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient lives alone and is highly anxious about the transient visual loss
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone with you at home tonight?
How are you feeling about all this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own here and honestly the eye thing has really scared me.
